title: heliotropium supinum var. malabaricum
intro: Heliotropium supinum var. malabaricum is a plant species, commonly known as the Indian heliotrope, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of diabetes. The herbal preparations of Heliotropium supinum var. malabaricum typically involve drying the leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or powders for medicinal use.
